title: Access control redirects signed-out users to authentication
description: Verifies that a signed-out visitor attempting to open protected pages is redirected to the authentication page.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the authentication page
Verify the user lands on the authentication page
Verify the user lands on the authentication page

title: Sign in lands on the dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated learner can sign in with email and password and lands on the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Dashboard navigation to Library mode
description: Verifies an authenticated learner can navigate from the dashboard to the Library screen.

steps.description: Click the entry point to Library mode
Verify the Library screen is displayed

title: Complete a flashcard session and reach session summary
description: An authenticated learner can choose a study direction, progress through cards by revealing and marking them, and reach a session summary at the end.

steps.description: Click the link to navigate to the Flashcards mode
Select a valid study direction option
Reveal the answer for the current card
Mark the current card as known or for review
Continue through the flashcard session until it ends
Verify a session summary view is displayed

title: Library practice advances on Enter submission and updates progress
description: Verifies a learner can select a sentence set, submit a translation using Enter, and advance to the next sentence with progress updating.

steps.description: Click the entry point to Library mode
Select a sentence set from the Library
Fill a non-empty translation into the translation input field
Verify the next sentence prompt is displayed and progress indicates an increment

title: Dashboard navigation to Flashcards mode
description: Verifies an authenticated learner can navigate from the dashboard to the Flashcards screen.

steps.description: Click the entry point to Flashcards mode
Verify the Flashcards screen is displayed

title: Return to Dashboard after finishing flashcards
description: After completing a flashcard session, an authenticated learner can return to the Dashboard and see the main modes/progress available.

steps.description: Click the link to navigate to the Flashcards mode
Select a valid study direction option
Reveal the answer for the current card
Mark the current card as known or for review
Continue through the flashcard session until it ends
Use the provided navigation control to return to the dashboard
Verify the dashboard shows study progress and available modes

title: Library practice blocks empty submission
description: Verifies submitting an empty translation in Library practice is blocked with a validation prompt.

steps.description: Click the entry point to Library mode
Select a sentence set from the Library
Verify a validation prompt is visible asking for a translation

title: Create a new study set from uploaded content
description: An authenticated learner can upload a supported file in the Upload Modal, review extracted items, add selected items to a new study set, and see the new set available for selection in the Library.

steps.description: Click the control to open the upload modal
Upload a supported image file in the upload modal
Wait for extracted results to be displayed
Select one or more extracted items
Choose the option to add selected items to a new study set and complete the creation
Click the link to navigate to the Library mode
Verify the newly created study set is displayed and selectable in the library list

title: Add extracted items to an existing study set
description: An authenticated learner can paste text for extraction, select results, add them to an existing study set, and see the set updated as selectable practice material.

steps.description: Click the control to open the upload modal
Paste a non-empty text snippet into the text input area
Wait for extracted results to be displayed
Select one or more extracted items
Choose an existing study set destination and confirm adding the selected items
Click the link to navigate to the Library mode
Verify the destination study set is present and selectable for practice

title: Require file or text before submitting extraction
description: An authenticated learner cannot submit the Upload Modal extraction request when neither a file is uploaded nor text is provided and sees a validation message.

steps.description: Click the control to open the upload modal
Ensure the text input area is empty
Verify a validation error is visible indicating that a file or text input is required

title: Sign up rejects invalid email format
description: Verifies signing up with an invalid email format shows an email validation error and does not proceed to the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill an invalid email format into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Verify an email validation error is visible
